about:
I am a Senior Software Engineer with a Bachelor's degree in Information Technology from VIT Vellore. I specialize in building scalable backend systems and search infrastructure, with a strong focus on semantic retrieval, distributed services, and data-intensive platforms.

My core expertise lies in backend and platform engineering using technologies such as Java, Spring Boot, Python, Node.js, and distributed microservices. I have extensive experience designing and implementing search and data platforms using Elasticsearch, vector databases, and large-scale indexing pipelines. I also work across modern cloud-native environments leveraging Docker, Kubernetes / OpenShift, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platforms.

Throughout my professional experience, I have built scalable APIs, search services, and data processing pipelines that support high-performance applications. I enjoy solving complex engineering problems related to information retrieval, system scalability, and distributed architectures. I focus on writing clean, maintainable code and designing systems that are reliable, observable, and easy to evolve as products grow.

work.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Designed and implemented scalable semantic and vector search platforms using technologies such as Elasticsearch and Milvus, enabling efficient retrieval across large-scale enterprise datasets.

Built distributed backend services and ingestion pipelines using Python, FastAPI, Node.js and Java microservices to process unstructured content, generate embeddings and index metadata for high performance search workloads.
Developed automated search relevancy benchmarking frameworks to evaluate ranking quality across different retrieval strategies using metrics such as recall and ranking effectiveness.
Led migration and modernization of backend services to Kubernetes / OpenShift based infrastructure with autoscaling and improved reliability, enabling highly available cloud-native deployments.

work.title: Software Engineer
description: Architected and developed search microservices using Java, Spring Boot, MongoDB and Elasticsearch to support scalable indexing, querying and document management APIs.
Implemented hybrid search architectures combining BM25, sparse vector and dense vector retrieval techniques to improve relevance and ranking quality in large document collections.
Engineered Learning-to-Rank (LTR) pipelines using user interaction signals to improve personalized search relevance and ranking performance.
Built internal dashboards and tooling using Kibana and React to analyze query behavior, debug ranking signals and support search relevance tuning.

work.title: Program Associate
description: Developed backend integrations between enterprise systems and cloud object storage using RESTful services to support large-scale document ingestion workflows.
Built automation tools using Spring Boot and CLI utilities to monitor multiple distributed applications and streamline operational workflows.
Implemented BDD-based automated testing using Karate, Selenium and Cucumber and integrated results into Jenkins CI/CD pipelines to improve testing coverage.
Collaborated across backend and platform teams to enhance reliability, monitoring and deployment workflows for microservice-based applications.

work.title: Intern Analyst
description: Contributed to development of enterprise backend services using Grails (Spring) and implemented SonarQube quality gates with comprehensive unit testing achieving high code coverage.
Improved frontend architecture by migrating legacy applications from AngularJS to Angular, enhancing performance and maintainability.
Resolved technical debt and refactored legacy modules by addressing static analysis issues and code smells to improve code quality.
Worked across backend and frontend stacks while participating in full software development lifecycle including testing and deployment.

work.title: SDE Summer Intern
description: Developed a predictive analytics solution using Python and machine learning libraries to analyze financial datasets and evaluate predictive models.
Built a full-stack web application using React, RESTful APIs and PostgreSQL to visualize and interact with model predictions.
Collaborated in an agile team environment to design application architecture, implement features and deploy the platform for internal demonstrations.
Participated in end-to-end software development lifecycle including data preprocessing, model development, testing and deployment.

work.title: Freelance Web Developer
description: Designed and developed a responsive web platform using React, Bootstrap and Sass with modular components and optimized UI performance.
Implemented modern frontend architecture with reusable components, responsive layouts and cross-browser compatibility.
Managed the complete development lifecycle including design, development, testing and deployment.
Collaborated with stakeholders to deliver a scalable and maintainable web solution.
